events.title: Sunday Bhakti Kirtan with Vasudev
events.description: Ubud's long-running Sunday kirtan gathering at Sayuri Healing Food's studio space in Peliatan. Described by the community as 'Ubud's most favourite Kirtan', the evening is a devotional circle of mantra, call-and-response chanting, and sacred song led by Vasudev — a resident kirtan facilitator with years of presence at this address. Walk-in, by donation. No pre-registration needed; the kirtan begins at 6 PM. Special editions (ticketed via Megatix, IDR 150–200k) occur when guest facilitators or themed formats are added.
events.short_description: Ubud's weekly Sunday kirtan by donation at Sayuri Healing Food's studio in Peliatan — devotional chanting led by resident facilitator Vasudev.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Ubud, Bali
